## Highlights

- **D25 — Classical-architect SA model.** `solution-architect` redefined from central-scribe + Phase-7-only sign-off to a classical architect with three activities across the lifecycle: **design** (Phase 1 elicit FRs/NFRs/Constraints + derive ASRs via ATAM utility tree; Phase 2 target architecture), **review** (any phase, on engineer-proposed architectural changes; APPROVE/REJECT/REQUEST-CHANGES; no code edits), **governance** (continuous, scoped only to PRs touching SA-owned files).
- **Two-file register topology.** New `local/requirements.md` (FRs/NFRs/Constraints inputs) + `local/asr-utility-tree.md` (ASRs derived via ATAM — outcomes, not the same level). Templates ship with the framework.
- **Doc-ownership redistribution.** CRs · project-instruction file · work-breakdown → `team-lead`. Per-tier docs → tier engineers (CI/CD guide → devops, READMEs → frontend/backend, test plans → QA). Architecture doc · ADRs · diagrams stay SA. `ai-engineer` counterpart generalized — all-roles ↔ ai-engineer.
- **`core/doc-co-ownership.md` → `core/doc-roles.md`** (renamed + rewritten).
- **Binding user-docs co-update rule** in `CLAUDE.md` — every adopter-facing framework change updates `docs/` in the same PR. Closes a recurring miss observed across pre-D25 feature PRs.

## Adopter migration — REQUIRED on upgrade

Run `@team-lead rediscover` (or `/ginee-rediscover`) on first invocation after upgrade. Discovery Step 8c re-attributes existing adopter docs per the new D25 ownership map + initializes the two new register files + flags greenfield projects. Full spec: [`core/MIGRATIONS/D25-classical-architect.md`](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D25-classical-architect.md).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.9.0...v0.10.0
